title: Xcode
html:
Apple's IDE — Yahir's physical-device testing target for BroMenu / Brotein / Outpace / Swipr. The 21-citation density tracks the BroMenu → Brotein → Outpace iOS-build sprint from late 2024 → mid 2026. Yahir runs the iOS Simulator extensively (avoids paying Apple Developer fee by sideloading early on) before promoting builds to TestFlight.

TL;DR

  • Adopted late 2024 as part of the BroMenu founding stack (2024 12 21 todos).
  • Used in tandem with SwiftUI (UI), WindSurf (AI pair-programming), Supabase (backend), TestFlight / App Store Connect (distribution).
  • Most screenshots come from the summer 2025 brotein build sprint (Jul 2 → Aug 16) — UI work, simulator runs, build errors, archive submissions.
  • iOS Simulator screenshots (2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 08 at 23 29 54 c694ad0a, 2025 09 12 simulator screenshot iphone 16 plus 2025 09 11 at 22 11 20 7327f1af, 2025 09 03 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 09 03 at 09 48 44 9dd31d21) are a sub-cluster of their own.
  • Continues into the Outpace polish sprint (Oct 2025 → Mar 2026).

Key facts

  • Stack DNA from BroMenu. 2024 12 21 todos — Xcode listed alongside SwiftUI + WindSurf + OpenAI as the founding toolchain.
  • Sideload-then-pay path. Early Brotein development used Xcode for direct device install before paying Apple Developer fees — the bridge-income discipline applied to Apple's pricing.
  • Simulator-heavy QA loop. Yahir captures simulator screenshots as proof-of-feature (2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 08 at 23 29 54 c694ad0a cluster) — the simulator is part of the feedback loop, not just preview.
  • Pairs with archive/submission. The same Xcode workflow that builds also archives and uploads to App Store Connect — full ship pipeline.

Source summaries

  • 2024 12 21 todos — founding stack
  • 2025 07 02 screenshot 2025 07 02 at 8 00 18 pm 95c50909 — Brotein UI iteration
  • 2025 07 10 screenshot 2025 07 10 at 1 44 15 am 3578be1a — late-night build session
  • 2025 07 13 screenshot 2025 07 13 at 12 50 47 am 2a50684f
  • 2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 08 at 23 29 54 c694ad0a — Simulator QA
  • 2025 09 03 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 09 03 at 09 48 44 9dd31d21
  • 2025 09 12 simulator screenshot iphone 16 plus 2025 09 11 at 22 11 20 7327f1af
  • 2025 10 09 screenshot 2025 10 09 at 12 16 22 pm 1b46a861 — Outpace work begins
  • 2025 10 15 screenshot 2025 10 15 at 7 33 50 pm f0a65653
  • 2025 07 27 screenshot 2025 07 27 at 2 02 52 pm 11e3a138 — App Store Connect bridge

Plus ~10 additional build-session screenshots.

Connections

  • swiftui · windsurf ide · supabase · openai api — core toolchain
  • testflight · app store connect · revenuecat — distribution toolchain
  • bromenu · brotein · outpace · swipr · irl lore — projects built in Xcode
  • ios simulator — sub-tool
  • m1 mac — host hardware
